title: selaginella brackenridgei
intro: Selaginella brackenridgei, also known as the Hawaiian spikemoss, is a species of spikemoss that is native to the Hawaiian Islands and is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. The medicinal properties of Selaginella brackenridgei include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve respiratory health. Selaginella brackenridgei can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
